introSection: The Pinfari is a steel roller coaster at Lakeside Amusement Park in Denver, Colorado, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster opened in 1978 at Hamel's Park as Thunderail.

The coaster has not been given a formal name since arriving at Lakeside Amusement Park and is referred to as "The Pinfari".

fullText:
The Pinfari is a steel roller coaster at Lakeside Amusement Park in Denver, Colorado, USA.

The coaster opened in 1978 at Hamel's Park as Thunderail.

The coaster has not been given a formal name since arriving at Lakeside Amusement Park and is referred to as "The Pinfari".



Red track and white supports.
